steps.title: Set up the equation
steps.content:
Since $f(a) = 9$ and $f(x) = \frac{x+18}{6}$, substitute $a$ into the function definition:
$$\frac{a+18}{6} = 9$$

steps.title: Solve for a
steps.content:
Multiply both sides by 6 to eliminate the fraction:
$$a + 18 = 54$$
Subtract 18 from both sides:
$$a = 36$$
That matches Choice C — $36$.
